message:
Add SQLite C source as git submodule for reference

Adds the official SQLite repository (https://github.com/sqlite/sqlite) as
a git submodule at legacy_sqlite_code/sqlite, pinned to commit 450a90097f
(the version used as behavioral reference for this reimplementation).

This ~218K LOC C codebase serves as the specification and behavioral
reference for the clean-room Rust reimplementation. Key reference files:

- src/vdbe.c: 190+ VDBE opcode implementations (case OP_* pattern),
  used to define fsqlite-types::Opcode and guide fsqlite-vdbe
- src/sqliteLimit.h: all SQLITE_MAX_* constants, mirrored in
  fsqlite-types::limits
- src/btree.c: B-tree operations reference for fsqlite-btree
- src/build.c: schema/DDL handling reference for fsqlite-core
- src/expr.c: expression evaluation reference for fsqlite-planner
- src/func.c: built-in function implementations for fsqlite-func
- src/pager.c: page cache and journal logic for fsqlite-pager
- src/wal.c: WAL implementation reference for fsqlite-wal

Tracked as a submodule (not vendored) to avoid bloating the repository
while maintaining a reproducible reference point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
